name: Cell Tower Inspection: ROI Orbit Mission Planning
description: You are a Remote Sensing Scientist planning a cell tower inspection mission for a telecommunications client. Using the parameters provided in the work order at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/inspection_workorder.txt, create a QGC mission plan for the tower at -35.3600, 149.1680. The mission must include a takeoff, a Region of Interest (ROI) at 25m altitude to track the tower midpoint, a loiter orbit (30m radius, 50m altitude, 2 full turns), and a return to launch. Save the completed mission plan to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/tower_inspection.plan.
